name: Titanic Survival Prediction
desc: Predict whether a passenger survived the Titanic disaster based on passenger attributes like age, sex, class, and fare.

name: House Price Prediction
desc: Predict the selling price of houses based on features like size, location, number of rooms, and age of the property.

name: MNIST Digit Recognition
desc: Classify handwritten digits (0-9) from image pixel data.

name: Sentiment Analysis on Movie Reviews
desc: Predict the sentiment (positive or negative) of movie reviews based on text data.

name: Customer Churn Prediction
desc: Predict whether a customer will leave a subscription service based on usage patterns, demographics, and history.

name: Credit Card Fraud Detection
desc: Detect fraudulent credit card transactions from anonymized transaction data.

name: Image Captioning
desc: Generate a caption for an image using deep learning models.

name: Stock Price Prediction
desc: Predict the next-day stock price movement (up/down) based on historical price data and trading volume.

name: Fake News Detection
desc: Classify whether a given news article is real or fake based on its headline and content.

name: Breast Cancer Prediction
desc: Predict whether a tumor is malignant or benign based on medical diagnostic features.
